page_metadata.biotools__summary: Compute the statistical significance of multiple sequence alignments (of either nucleotide or amino acid sequences), much as BLAST’s E-values provide statistical significance for pairwise alignments.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Compute the statistical significance of multiple sequence alignments (of either nucleotide or amino acid sequences), much as BLAST’s E-values provide statistical significance for pairwise alignments.
